title: acroptilon repens subsp. australe
intro: Acroptilon repens subsp. australe, also known as Australian knawel, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve flatulence. The health benefits of Australian knawel include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving respiratory function, and supporting immune system function. Traditional herbal preparations of Australian knawel include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote digestive health and relieve symptoms of colds and flu.
